name: Cora
subtitle: the bus driver on the midnight route

ultimate_ability.label: The Long Haul
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game, fix your eyes on the road. The bus advances two miles without spending fuel and Doubt drops by 2. Cora knows this road.

notes: Cora's hand is the driver loop — DRIVE / WATCH MIRROR / ANNOUNCE / PULL OVER as starters. The location is a bus that physically advances along a route — MILES is the positive doom-clock; FUEL is the spendable currency. Visitors are passengers who board at scheduled stops and disembark at thresholds. Spec: lore/_TAROT_GAUNTLET_SCENARIOS.md.
